items.title: ELLE MEN COVER JULY 2026 — TIMETHAI x Gucci Generation Collection
items.summary: Thai artist TIMETHAI covers the July 2026 issue of ELLE Men Thailand in looks from Gucci's Generation collection by Demna, with an exclusive interview on how he abandoned social trends to develop his own personal style. Photographer: Napat Gunkham; Stylist: Chanond Mingmit.

items.title: 5 ไฮไลต์สำคัญจากโชว์ GucciCore ของ Gucci Cruise 2027 (5 Key Highlights from Gucci Cruise 2027 GucciCore Show)
items.summary: Thai-language coverage of Gucci's Cruise 2027 'GucciCore' show at Times Square, highlighting the New York homecoming narrative, celebrity front-row attendance, the fictional Gucci sub-brand universe displayed on billboards, menswear focus inspired by Robert Longo photography, and Demna's permanent core wardrobe concept.

items.title: Gulf Kanawut's brand collaborations in 2026: Gucci, Onitsuka Tiger, Sulwhasoo and more
items.summary: Tatler Asia profiles Gulf Kanawut's ongoing Gucci ambassadorship into 2026 under Demna's creative direction. At FW2026 Milan show in February, Gulf's black crop top and baggy trousers look became one of the most widely shared moments of the event. The partnership reflects 'the growing importance of Southeast Asia within the brand's global audience.'

items.title: Billkin Putthipong's growing brand portfolio, from Gucci to Skintific
items.summary: Tatler Asia documents Thai actor and Gucci ambassador Billkin Putthipong's 2026 brand activities. His Gucci engagement in 2026 centres on digital activation and regional events; he acknowledged the Primavera show on Instagram by featuring the Jackie 1961 bag, though he did not attend Milan in person.

items.title: Chinese Actress Tian Xi Wei Turns Heads at Gucci's Generation Gucci Launch in Singapore
items.summary: Pursuit of Jade actress Tian Xi Wei drew significant social media attention at the Generation Gucci launch at Marina Bay Sands on 22 May 2026, wearing the Paparazzo bag. The event sent social media into a frenzy and further established her as a rising fashion icon.

items.title: Billkin Served Looks At Gucci's Spring/Summer 2026 Launch At Marina Bay Sands
items.summary: Thai actor Billkin Putthipong attended the SS2026 'La Famiglia' collection preview at the revamped Gucci Marina Bay Sands flagship — the only SEA store carrying the line — dressed in a black turtleneck suit with a gold Horsebit chain and Jackie bag. Boutique interior redesigned with warm-toned wood and horse murals.

items.title: Gucci Did The Impossible: It Made Times Square Chic
items.summary: ELLE Singapore reviewed Gucci's Cruise 2027 'GucciCore' show at Times Square, calling it a feat of making the tourist-heavy plaza feel luxurious. Critic Véronique Hyland noted Demna's 'commutercore' concept — models carrying iPhones and bodega flowers — and the star-studded lineup of Kim Kardashian, Mariah Carey, and Cindy Crawford.

items.title: Gucci's La Famiglia collection brings peak 'Gucciness' to Marina Bay Sands, Singapore
items.summary: Gucci unveiled its La Famiglia collection at Marina Bay Sands on 24 September 2025 with a regional VIP preview. Five regional tastemakers — including brand ambassador Billkin — modelled a 'constellation of dynamic characters' anchored in heritage pieces: Horsebit, Jackie, and Bamboo 1947. Full retail launch planned for January 2026.

items.title: Gucci Primavera untuk Musim Gugur/Dingin 2026 Menandai Era Baru Gucci Bersama Demna
items.summary: Indonesian-language coverage in Elle Indonesia of Demna's debut Gucci FW2026 Primavera collection, describing it as marking a new era for the house. Highlights include heat-sealed invisible hems, curved silhouettes, feather-embellished outerwear, and Kate Moss closing in a sequined gown with a diamond-encrusted gold thong belt.

items.title: Menjelajahi Kota Arsip Gucci di Koleksi Gucci Cruise 2026
items.summary: Indonesian magazine Dewi covered Gucci's Cruise 2026 collection presented in Florence, drawing on the city's medieval textile heritage. The collection blends dramatic structured shoulders with elongated cuts designed for versatility throughout the day, referencing archival pieces from Palazzo Settimanni.

items.title: Demna Takes Over Times Square With the Debut of 'GucciCore' for Cruise 2027
items.summary: Hypebeast reported on the Gucci Cruise 2027 GucciCore show, describing fictional sub-brands ('Gucci Pets', 'Gucci Gym', 'Palazzo Gucci') projected on Times Square billboards alongside the runway. Collection merges city archetypes with luxury; invitations arrived as aged-leather brass keys referencing the 1980s Gucci Galleria.

items.title: Kering reports Q1 sales decline as Gucci weighs on performance
items.summary: Kering reported Q1 2026 group revenue of €3.56bn (−6% reported), with Gucci declining 14% reported / 8% comparable to €1.34bn. Jewellery division grew 14% to €269m, partially offsetting Gucci's drag. North America showed relative strength; Asia-Pacific remained a key challenge.

items.title: Gucci comes home — and lands in Manila
items.summary: PhilSTAR Life covered Gucci's Cruise 2026 holiday event in Manila: an intimate Michelin-starred lunch at Helm (Makati) followed by a boutique preview at Greenbelt 4. Key attendees included Anne Curtis-Smith, Marian Rivera, and Kylie Verzosa. The Giglio bag, inspired by Florence's lily emblem, was the season's standout piece.

items.title: Asian Celebs at Gucci SS26: Billkin & VIPs in Singapore
items.summary: Mega Asia documented the regional VIP preview of Gucci's SS26 'La Famiglia' collection at Marina Bay Sands, featuring Billkin and regional tastemakers. The new MBS boutique redesign — warm wood walls, horse murals — signals Gucci's long-term investment in Singapore as its SEA flagship hub.
